latest.title: Jeremy Clarkson in remission from prostate cancer
latest.summary: The 66-year-old announced the positive news days after he shared his "aggressive" cancer diagnosis.

latest.title: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free

radar.summary: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

radar.title: Cape Verde Will Count on Vozinha Against Uruguay at the World Cup
radar.summary: Cape Verde’s veteran goalkeeper, Vozinha, is keeping the archipelago nation’s hopes outsized after his performance against soccer giant Spain.

radar.title: Why the social media ban is about so much more than social media
radar.summary: If we are witnessing a profound shift in the online space, how will it reshape our relationship with it? Technology and AI editor Zoe Kleinman writes.

radar.title: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
